store_headline: WooCommerce Theme for Urban Fashion Brands
store_subheadline: Launch a bold urban fashion store with product quick view, wishlist, and multi-currency built in.
features: Dropdown cart panel for easy shopping
Login popup for streamlined user experience
One-click demo import for quick setup
Content Blocks system for reusable sections
Multiple product layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included with extended features
selling_points: Built specifically for streetwear and urban fashion brands, with graffiti-style layouts generic WooCommerce themes can't replicate
WooCommerce storefront with product quick view, variation swatches, and a slide-out cart for fashion UX
Lookbook and editorial product layouts let you tell a collection story — not just list SKUs
Multi-currency support enables international streetwear sales from launch, no additional plugin required
Wishlist and login popup reduce drop-off for returning customers building their next-season list
Bold urban identity that speaks to street fashion audiences — distinct from boutique or luxury themes
Grid, masonry, and metro catalog layouts let you control how each collection drop is presented
key_benefits: Launch a bold urban fashion store with a streetwear-native aesthetic
Convert shoppers with quick view, wishlist, and a slide-out cart
Showcase editorial lookbooks and collection drops — not just product grids
Sell internationally from day one with built-in multi-currency switching
Layouts tailored for fashion retail — not general e-commerce
Position your brand at the intersection of street culture and retail

testimonials.text: Modern design with lots of flexibility. Easy to use with great documentation. 5 stars!
testimonials.author: peson82

testimonials.text: Great template with many customizable features and easy to use. Design quality is great with loads of options and easy to read and understand documentation.
testimonials.author: RaeShantael

testimonials.text: We love this theme for our agency, it's magnificent, beautifully responsive and the support is very present. We appreciate it a lot!
testimonials.author: USTS
